manager.name: ComfyUI-Manager
manager.reason: CLI and UI management for custom node installation, updates, snapshots, and dependency fixes.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-EasyOCR
nodes.reason: Detect text and produce OCR masks for text/watermark removal workflows. Uses the fork with robust OCR box handling and sensitivity presets.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-qwenmultiangle
nodes.reason: Adds Qwen multi-angle camera prompt controls. Uses the fork and is always dependency-checked by the installer.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Watermark-Detection
nodes.reason: YOLO watermark detector that outputs a binary mask for watermark removal workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI_essentials
nodes.reason: Provides MaskBoundingBox+ for padded bbox crops around detected OCR masks.

nodes.name: was-node-suite-comfyui
nodes.reason: Provides Masks Combine Batch to union EasyOCR's batched text masks.

nodes.name: comfyui-fast-mosaic-detector
nodes.reason: Detects mosaic/pixel-block regions and outputs a binary mask for auto mosaic inpaint workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Olm-DragCrop
nodes.reason: Adds an interactive drag-crop image node for explicit manual box selection in workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Impact-Pack
nodes.reason: Provides YOLO/SAM face mask utilities such as BboxDetectorForEach, SAMLoader, SAMDetectorCombined, SegsToCombinedMask, ImpactDilateMask, and mask conversion helpers.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Impact-Subpack
nodes.reason: Provides UltralyticsDetectorProvider for YOLO face detection used to generate automatic face masks.

nodes.name: comfyui_face_parsing
nodes.reason: Provides face parsing and bbox crop nodes for tight face-only masks that exclude hair, neck, clothing, and background.
